title: Modded Cobblemon
description: A Cobblemon modpack with various mods to provide an authentic modded experience
body:
# Modded Cobblemon

## Overview
Some friends and I wanted to play Cobblemon, but I couldn't find a modpack that'd be both easy for newer players to pick up and have enough depth to be enjoyable for veteran players. So I made this modpack for us to play on our private server. Granted, it grew a lot bigger than I was expecting it to, but I think it achieves the balance I was looking for. 

**--- Update - 12/9/2025 ---**  
We've since moved on from this pack, so I'm no longer working on maintaining it or keeping it up-to-date.

## Features

Of course, the centerpiece of this pack is Cobblemon, along with a bunch of add-ons that add some of the missing features that the base mod doesn't have implemented yet. Alongside that, there's a number of key mods that help give that "modded Minecraft" feel:
* Ambiance:
    * Ambient Sounds
    * Fabric Seasons
    * LambDynamicLights
    * Presence Footsteps
* Agriculture
    * Cooking for Blockheads
    * Croptopia
* Cobblemon Add-ons
    * Breeding
    * Capture EXP
    * Outbreaks
    * Spawn Notifications
    * Mounts
* Decorations
    * Decorative Blocks
    * Macaw's Furniture
    * Supplementaries
* Storage
    * Expanded Storage
    * Extended Drawers
    * Tom's Simple Storage Mod
* Technology
    * Create
* Utilities
    * Right-click Harvest
    * Lootr
    * Nature's Compass
    * Retraining
    * Utility Belt
    * Xaero's Minimap & World Map
* World Generation
    * Terralith

Full Modlist can be found [here](https://michaeldoescoding.net/minecraft/modpacks/cobblemon.html). 

## Datapacks
         
The pack also include folders for datapacks and resource packs to add some additional Pokemon that aren't included in the base mod. To use them, enable all the resource packs included (even if it says the pack is out of date, it should still work) and then include all the datapacks into whatever world you create.
   * CobbleCats
   * Cobblemon Create Compat
   * Cobblemon Shiny Effects
   * Cobblemon Swap Pokeballs
   * CobblemonLoot
   * CobblemonOutbreaks++
   * DeCube's MoMons
   * Diance Addition
   * Dracomon
   * Expanded Moveset
   * Genomons
   * LostMons
   * MissingMons
   * MysticMons
   * Pigeon Pack

## Known Issues

* Opening containers within a minecart contraption occasionally crashes the server
* Deployers that kill a mob will crash the server
    * These are known bugs within Create Fabric. They don't have an official patch yet, but a patched version of Create can be found [here](https://github.com/Fabricators-of-Create/Create/issues/1096#issuecomment-1864507425)
